engineering.translation: Those whose mind is established in equality (sāmye sthitam manaḥ) have, here in this very life (iha eva), conquered the cycle (jitaḥ sargaḥ). Brahman is faultless and equal; therefore they are established in Brahman. Krishna names a state achievable iha eva — here, in this life, in this career. Brahma-stha is not a posthumous claim. The engineering analog: the senior whose mind is established in equality (the sama-darśana of 5.18, applied to the affective swings of 5.20-5.22) has, by mid-career, conquered the cycle of grasping and aversion that drives most engg pathology. The conquest is not deferred to retirement; it is observable in the principal's day-to-day disposition. STRETCHED honestly because brahma-stha exceeds the operational layer; the iha eva claim is preserved at operational scope.
engineering.concrete_scenario: A staff engineer at fifteen years' tenure on the Postgres-payments stack has stopped responding to the cycle. The hostile code review does not produce the rage on the GitHub PR thread her younger self produced. The lavish promotion-recognition does not produce the elation-then-anxiety Slack-spiral her younger ātman yielded. The market-comp swing of competitor offers does not produce the should-I-leave Datadog-comp swing her younger self produced. The cycle has been conquered iha eva — at fifteen years, in this career, before retirement. Her teammates have noticed: incidents land on her without producing fight-or-flight; promotions land on her sans producing hubris-then-collapse; criticism lands on her without producing defensive flare-up. The verse's jitaḥ sargaḥ is operationally observable. STRETCHED honestly; the brahma-stha claim reaches further than the operational stability the engineering analog can name. The cross-reference inventory: Kafka, Redis, MongoDB, Elasticsearch, Kubernetes, Docker, Terraform, Jenkins.
engineering.falsifiability: The analog fails if a reader hears 'conquered the cycle' as 'no longer feels emotion.' The senior in the example feels everything; what is absent is the *capture* of identity by the affective swing. Feeling proceeds; capture does not.
engineering.counter_example: When a senior engineer's stability is genuinely flatness — when affect has been suppressed rather than non-captured — the verse does not endorse this. The brahma-stha is not flatness; it is established equality. The flat-affect senior has not conquered the cycle; they have left the field.
engineering.implication: Track your affective swings across a quarter. Is the cycle conquered iha eva, or is it being deferred to a future state? The verse names the conquest as available now.
engineering.quotable_line: The senior's mind is established in equality here in this career, not deferred to retirement. Iha eva.

Cross-references to chapters 2-4 preserved.
